'''todasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fabacean|fabacean]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fabacean|fabacean]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| todasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:todasithi|todasithi]] || [[word:todasiji|todasiji]] || [[word:todasishi|todasishi]] || [[word:todasiki|todasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:todasuthuthu|todasuthuthu]] || [[word:todasujuju|todasujuju]] || [[word:todasushushu|todasushushu]] || [[word:todasukuku|todasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:todasuthu|todasuthu]] || [[word:todasuju|todasuju]] || [[word:todasushu|todasushu]] || [[word:todasuku|todasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:todasufthuf|todasufthuf]] || [[word:todasufjuf|todasufjuf]] || [[word:todasufshuf|todasufshuf]] || [[word:todasufkuf|todasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:todasethe|todasethe]] || [[word:todaseje|todaseje]] || [[word:todaseshe|todaseshe]] || [[word:todaseke|todaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:todasothotho|todasothotho]] || [[word:todasojojo|todasojojo]] || [[word:todasoshosho|todasoshosho]] || [[word:todasokoko|todasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:todasotho|todasotho]] || [[word:todasojo|todasojo]] || [[word:todasosho|todasosho]] || [[word:todasoko|todasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:todasofthof|todasofthof]] || [[word:todasofjof|todasofjof]] || [[word:todasofshof|todasofshof]] || [[word:todasofkof|todasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:todasĂŻfthĂŻf|todasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfjĂŻf|todasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfshĂŻf|todasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfkĂŻf|todasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:todasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|todasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|todasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|todasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|todasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:todasĂŻfthĂŻf|todasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfjĂŻf|todasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfshĂŻf|todasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfkĂŻf|todasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:todasĂŻfthĂŻf|todasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfjĂŻf|todasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfshĂŻf|todasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:todasĂŻfkĂŻf|todasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:todasĂŠthĂŠ|todasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:todasĂŠjĂŠ|todasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:todasĂŠshĂŠ|todasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:todasĂŠkĂŠ|todasĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:todasathatha|todasathatha]] || [[word:todasajaja|todasajaja]] || [[word:todasashasha|todasashasha]] || [[word:todasakaka|todasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:todasatha|todasatha]] || [[word:todasaja|todasaja]] || [[word:todasasha|todasasha]] || [[word:todasaka|todasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:todasafthaf|todasafthaf]] || [[word:todasafjaf|todasafjaf]] || [[word:todasafshaf|todasafshaf]] || [[word:todasafkaf|todasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:todasasha|todasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:todashĂ«sha|todashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:todasrosha|todasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:todasmusha|todasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:todasyasha|todasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotodasnkshĂ«sha|gotodasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotodasnkrosha|gotodasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotodasnkmusha|gotodasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotodasnkyasha|gotodasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:todadasasha|todadasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:todadashĂ«sha|todadashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:todadasrosha|todadasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:todadasmusha|todadasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:todadasyasha|todadasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotodadasnkshĂ«sha|gotodadasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotodadasnkrosha|gotodadasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotodadasnkmusha|gotodadasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotodadasnkyasha|gotodadasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tedĂŠsasha|tedĂŠsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tedĂŠshĂ«sha|tedĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tedĂŠsrosha|tedĂŠsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tedĂŠsmusha|tedĂŠsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tedĂŠsyasha|tedĂŠsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotedĂŠsnkshĂ«sha|gotedĂŠsnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotedĂŠsnkrosha|gotedĂŠsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotedĂŠsnkmusha|gotedĂŠsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotedĂŠsnkyasha|gotedĂŠsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:todfasasha|todfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:todfashĂ«sha|todfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:todfasrosha|todfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:todfasmusha|todfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:todfasyasha|todfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotodfasnkshĂ«sha|gotodfasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotodfasnkrosha|gotodfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotodfasnkmusha|gotodfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotodfasnkyasha|gotodfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
